revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''VTS-2012-25

A place where a ship in need of assistance can take action to enable it to stabilize its condition and reduce hazards to navigation, and to protect human life and the environment.


Source: IMO A.949(23)

(VTS33/output/8 refers)
